case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. GLENDA DEL SOCORRO PEREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GLENDA DEL SOCORRO PEREZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, GLENDA DEL SOCORRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, GLENDA DEL SOCORRO
